name: drawer
description: A side-panel overlay that slides in from a viewport edge, headless CONTROLLED / UNCONTROLLED (architecture contract overlay doctrine). UNCONTROLLED (default): the trigger is a real <button command="show-modal" commandfor> (browser invoker command API); the browser opens the <dialog> as a native modal (top-layer, ::backdrop, focus-trap, Escape) with zero JS. CONTROLLED: pass open (from the caller's @Wire boolean) and closeAction (wire action name); when open=true, a positioned panel + scrim are rendered; data-controller="lv-drawer" mounts the Stimulus focus-trap controller (Tab cycle, scroll-lock, return-focus, Esc fires closeAction via the controlled/uncontrolled doctrine); when open=false, the panel is hidden (absent from a11y tree) and the trap is dropped. Placement: right (default) | left | top | bottom. Sizes: sm (320px) | md (480px, default) | lg (640px) | xl (800px) | full. modal=false renders the APG non-modal dialog variant (no scrim, no trap, page interactive). push=true (non-modal only) shifts page content via CSS sibling selector. destroyOnClose=true removes the panel subtree from the DOM when closed. Closable controls X + Esc + scrim-click together. WAI-ARIA APG Dialog (Modal/Non-modal): role=dialog, aria-modal (modal mode only), aria-labelledby/aria-label, icon-only close button aria-label. Content: owned body (never a slot -- the projection contract), optional footer. Replaces the old static slide-over.jte (which used native <dialog> top-layer only) with the full headless WIRE-ready surface. No Java component, no @Wire field.
docs: Copies drawer.jte + drawer.css to your JTE root at lievit/drawer.jte and lievit/drawer.css, reached as @template.lievit.drawer(...). UNCONTROLLED (default): pass a trigger Content slot and a unique id; the browser opens and closes the panel natively with zero JS (command="show-modal"). CONTROLLED: pass open (your @Wire boolean) and closeAction (the wire action name) to let the server own the open-state; the lv-drawer Stimulus controller handles the focus cycle + scroll-lock + return-focus + Esc. Both modes support: title (panel accessible name -> aria-labelledby), placement (right|left|top|bottom), size (sm|md|lg|xl|full), modal (default true; false = non-modal variant), closable (X + Esc + scrim, default true), push (layout-shift for non-modal; requires a [data-slot=page-content] or <main> sibling), destroyOnClose (remove subtree when closed, default false). Start the Stimulus application (startStimulus) when using controlled+modal mode; the lv-drawer controller auto-registers by filename. TOKENS_NEEDED: --lv-space-drawer-sm/md/lg/xl (panel dimensions) and --lv-motion-slide (slide transition duration) -- the CSS falls back to fixed values + --lv-duration-slow until the coordinator adds these tokens.
